options.content:
E-Commerce Conversion Intelligence — MLOps Mission Control
Current snapshot health, model quality, high-intent demand, anomaly signals, forecast outlook, and project coverage — powered by a fast cached monitoring snapshot.
Portfolio story: heavy batch analytics are separated from lightweight snapshot-based monitoring, so Prometheus scrapes stay fast and Grafana remains responsive.

panels.title: Conversion Rate — Labels Required
panels.description: Displayed only when actual conversion outcome labels are available. The unlabeled production scoring table intentionally does not publish this metric.

panels.title: Forecast Totals by KPI — Current Snapshot

options.content:
### Why this dashboard is fast
- Heavy CSV files are processed once by `build_monitoring_snapshot.py`.
- Prometheus scrapes a lightweight exporter that reads only `ecommerce_metrics_snapshot.json`.
- This separates heavy batch analytics from lightweight snapshot-based operational monitoring. The current project does not claim live event-stream processing.
